iframes.style: position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; visibility: hidden;

iframes.title: No content
iframes.style: width: 0px; height: 0px; border: 0px; position: absolute; top: -9999px;

iframes.title: Ανοίγει ένα widget όπου μπορείτε να βρείτε περισσότερες πληροφορίες
iframes.style: color-scheme: light; width: 48px; height: 50px; padding: 0px; margin: 10px 20px; position: fixed; bottom: 0px; overflow: visible; opacity: 0; border: 0px; z-index: 999998; transition-duration: 250ms; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1); transition-property: opacity, top, bottom; top: -9999px; visibility: hidden;
